actions.detail: Validated wp-20260304-planner-barrel-allowed-paths-repair. orbt_mode=repair, target=imo-creator, human authority granted for locked file modification.
Read ai/agents/planner/master_prompt.md (v2.4.0, 302 lines). Found allowed_paths rule at line 94 in Field Generation Rules.

Added barrel rule to allowed_paths field: when individual files within a directory are listed instead of the directory itself, the barrel file (index.ts, index.js, index.mts, mod.ts) MUST be explicitly included if the Builder will modify it. When a directory path is listed, barrel files are implicitly in scope.
